headline: Agilent Announces Cash Dividend of 25.5 Cents per Share
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., May 20, 2026--Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) today announced a quarterly dividend of 25.5 cents per share of common stock. The quarterly dividend will be paid on July 22, 2026, to all shareholders of record as of the close of business on June 30, 2026.

raw.headline: Agilent Announces Cash Dividend of 25.5 Cents per Share

headline: Agilent and Singapore's NATi Partner to Advance Lipid-Conjugated Oligonucleotide Research
summary: Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) today announced a two-year research collaboration agreement with Singapore's Nucleic Acid Therapeutics Initiative (NATi), hosted by Agency for Science, Technology and Research (A*STAR), to accelerate research into complex oligonucleotide (oligo) candidates, a promising frontier in precision therapeutics with potential applications across cardiovascular-metabolic, rare and infectious diseases.
